name: Bagna Caudi (on Ziti with Carrots)
recipeInstructions:
The Sauce: Heat the butter and olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add the chopped garlic and cook until lightly browned. Stir in the chopped anchovies and cook until dissolved. Gradually add the heavy cream, mustard, and roasted garlic, stirring to combine. Reduce the mixture by one-fourth.
Final Assembly: Remove the saucepan from heat. Add the cooked ziti and sliced carrots. Toss everything together until well coated. Serve immediately.
